case_title: INVESTMENT RETRIEVERS, INC. VS. AFSANEH VALIZADEH et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT VALIZADEH, AFSANEH AFI & ASSOCIATES, INC. DBA AFI AND ASSOCIATES, INC . JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 1.0 DAYS
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR APR-01-2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON OCT-02-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PLAINTIFF INVESTMENT RETRIEVERS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-07-2014 AT 01:00 PM IN DEPT. 212 WITH CONFERENCE OFFICER TROY D. WIGGINS.
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-28-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. PLAINTIFF INVESTMENT RETRIEVERS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED AS TO DEFENDANTS AFI AND ASSOCIATES, INC. AND MR. AFSANEH VALIZADEH. THE COURT OVERRULES DEFENDANTS' OBJECTIONS TO THE DECLARATIONS OF MS. SOOTH AND MR. GRIESMAN. THEY MEET THE REQUIREMENTS OF EVIDENCE CODE SEC. 1271. NEVERTHELESS, PLAINTIFF FAILS TO MAINTAIN ITS INITIAL BURDEN OF PRODUCTION BECAUSE THE ATTACHED LOAN APPLICATION AND GUARANTEE ARE ILLEGIBLE. LASTLY, THE DECLARATION OF MR. AFSANEH VALIZADEH CREATES A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT REGARDING WHETHER HE EXECUTED THE CONTRACT THAT PLAINTIFF RELIES UPON. ((PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CCP 473C(G) AND CRC 3.1312.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976.

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR APR-01-2014 - PARTIES REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT THE CASE SETTLED. CASE IS ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON JUN-17-2014 AT 10:30 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: EBURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF INVESTMENT RETRIEVERS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 12, 2014 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 28, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED.
